content.explanation:
**Stationery Vocabulary — Office & School Supplies:**

Stationery = stationary नहीं! (stationary = न हिलने वाला)
Stationery = writing supplies (पेन, पेंसिल, आदि)

**Common Stationery Items:**
| English | Hindi |
|---------|-------|
| Pen | कलम |
| Pencil | पेंसिल |
| Eraser / Rubber | रबड़ |
| Sharpener | शार्पनर |
| Ruler | पट्टी/स्केल |
| Notebook | कॉपी/नोटबुक |
| Stapler | स्टेपलर |
| Staple pins | स्टेपल पिन |
| Paper clip | पेपर क्लिप |
| Highlighter | हाइलाइटर |
| Marker | मार्कर |
| Whiteboard | वाइटबोर्ड |
| Scissors | कैंची |
| Glue stick | गोंद की छड़ी |
| Tape / Sellotape | टेप |
| File folder | फ़ाइल फ़ोल्डर |
| Envelopes | लिफाफे |
| Ink | स्याही |
| Ballpoint pen | बॉलपॉइंट पेन |
| Fountain pen | फाउंटेन पेन |
rules: Stationery items are mostly countable nouns: a pen, two pencils, three rulers
Some are uncountable: glue, ink, paper (in general)
Asking for stationery: "Do you have a stapler?" / "Can I borrow your pen?"
"Some/any" for general requests: "Do you have any spare paper?"
Office context: "Please send the stationery request to Admin."
Plural forms: one pencil → two pencils; one stapler → three staplers
Collective: "stationery" = all the items together (uncountable when collective)
content.memoryTrick:
**STATIONERY has an 'E' for ERASER 🖊️**
StationERy = things you WRITE with (E for writing equipment)
StationAry = not MOVING (A for At rest)
Remember this E/A trick forever!

examples.hindi: कृपया papers को paper clip से लगाओ।
examples.english: Please clip the papers with a paper clip.

examples.hindi: Office में सारी stationery खत्म हो गई।
examples.english: All the stationery in the office has run out.
Write on the whiteboard with a marker.

examples.hindi: गलती मिटाने के लिए eraser use करो।
examples.english: Use an eraser to erase the mistake.

mistakes.correct: Give me some stationery. / Can I have a pen?
Pass me the rubber band / eraser (British) / rubber (informal UK)
mistakes.why: 'Rubber' in US English = condom; say 'eraser' to be safe in international settings

mistakes.wrong: Use whiteboard marker on the paper.
mistakes.correct: Use a whiteboard marker on the whiteboard.
mistakes.why: Whiteboard markers are non-permanent — not meant for paper

speakingTips: Office में: 'Could you please restock the stationery cabinet?'
Classroom: 'I forgot my eraser — can I borrow yours?'
Admin request: 'I need to order some stationery for the new staff members.'

vocabulary.example: I prefer using a ballpoint pen.
Keep your documents in a binder.
Use a punching machine to make holes.
Write vocabulary words on index cards.

alternatives: i want a pen.
can you give me a pencil?
where did i put my eraser?
put it down on paper.
note it down in this notebook.

practice.english: She drew a line with the ruler.
alternatives: she drew a straight line using the ruler.
use scissors to cut the paper.
use a stapler to attach them.
she stuck it with glue.
i own a marker pen.
practice.hint: highlighter = महत्वपूर्ण चीज़ें mark करने वाला

alternatives: use the ruler to measure.

practice.english: Pin the paper to the board.
alternatives: attach the paper with a pin.

practice.english: I put the report in the file.
alternatives: i filed the report.
he used a marker to write.
i own a sharpener.
i want a pen.
can you give me a pencil?
where did i put my eraser?
put it down on paper.
note it down in this notebook.
